passage.title: A Day with Would Like To
passage.text: I would like to know this. I would like to meet you. She would like to ask something. We would like to have a coffee. They would like to travel. Would you like to eat something? I would like to know more about this. He would like to give his opinion. We would like to take this opportunity. Would you like to sit down?
passage.hindiTranslation: मैं यह जानना चाहूँगा। मैं आपसे मिलना चाहूँगा। वह कुछ पूछना चाहेगी। हम एक coffee लेना चाहेंगे। वे travel करना चाहेंगे। क्या आप कुछ खाना चाहेंगे? मैं इस बारे में और जानना चाहूँगा। वह अपनी राय देना चाहेगा। हम यह मौका लेना चाहेंगे। क्या आप बैठना चाहेंगे?
